item.title: Clinical impact of toxin detection in children with PCR-confirmed Clostridioides difficile infection.
item.description: European journal of pediatrics - Observational study - The diagnosis of Clostridioides difficile infection (CDI) in children is challenging due to high rates of asymptomatic colonization and the limited ability of available assays to differentiate colo...

item.title: Bacterial Gastrointestinal Infections in Pediatric Inflammatory Bowel Disease (PIBD)-A Single-Center Experience of Epidemiology, Management, and Outcome.
item.description: Diagnostics (Basel, Switzerland) - Background: Due to dysbiosis, intestinal barrier dysfunction, and immunosuppressive therapy, pediatric inflammatory bowel disease (PIBD) patients are more susceptible to infections. However, data o...

item.title: The relationship between health literacy and satisfaction with medical care in parents of children with chronic gastrointestinal diseases.
item.description: Frontiers in public health - Parents' satisfaction with pediatric care is often measured for single encounters, although families managing chronic conditions accumulate experiences across multiple contacts and settings. We aim...
